Package me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI

Class YoChatAPI

java.lang.Object
me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI.YoChatAPI
public class YoChatAPI extends Object

    Adds a muted player entry to YoChat.

    Removes all registered pipeline steps from every stage.

    Removes all registered steps from a single stage.

    Deletes a registered channel by name.

    Executes the full YoChat pipeline against the given context.

    Returns all registered pipeline steps across every stage.

    Returns the channel the given player currently belongs to.

    Returns a snapshot of all currently registered channels.

    Returns the muted player entry for the given UUID.

    Returns the names of all muted players that Bukkit can resolve.

    Returns a snapshot of all muted player entries.

    Parses a player-provided message using YoChat's MiniMessage rules and permissions.

    Registers a chat channel so it can be used by YoChat.

  • Constructor Details

    • YoChatAPI

      public YoChatAPI()

  • Method Details

    • getPlugin

      public static YoChat getPlugin()
      Returns the active YoChat plugin instance provided by the current API provider.
      Returns:
      the YoChat plugin instance

    • sendGlobalMessage

      public static void sendGlobalMessage(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message, org.bukkit.entity.Player sender)
      Broadcasts a formatted message to the global chat.
      Parameters:
      message - the message component to send
      sender - the player who sent the message

    • registerChannel

      public static void registerChannel(ChatChannel channel)
      Registers a chat channel so it can be used by YoChat.
      Parameters:
      channel - the channel to register

    • createChannel

      public static ChatChannel createChannel(String channelName, int radius, boolean strictWorld, @Nullable Set<String> worlds)
      Creates a new ChatChannel instance using YoChat's channel manager.
      Parameters:
      channelName - the channel name
      radius - the channel radius in blocks, or a non-positive value for unrestricted range
      strictWorld - whether the sender must also be inside an allowed world
      worlds - the allowed world names, or null for no world restriction
      Returns:
      the created channel instance

    • getChannel

      @Nullable public static @Nullable ChatChannel getChannel(String name)
      Looks up a registered channel by name.
      Parameters:
      name - the channel name
      Returns:
      the matching channel, or null if none exists

    • getChannels

      public static Collection<ChatChannel> getChannels()
      Returns a snapshot of all currently registered channels.
      Returns:
      an immutable collection of registered channels

    • deleteChannel

      public static void deleteChannel(String channelName)
      Deletes a registered channel by name.
      Parameters:
      channelName - the channel name to delete

    • joinChannel

      public static void joinChannel(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, ChatChannel channel)
      Moves a player into the given channel.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to move
      channel - the target channel

    • getChannelByPlayer

      @Nullable public static @Nullable ChatChannel getChannelByPlayer(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the channel the given player currently belongs to.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to check
      Returns:
      the player's current channel, or null if the player is not in any channel

    • sendToChannel

      public static void sendToChannel(ChatChannel channel, org.bukkit.entity.Player sender, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
      Sends a message through a specific channel using YoChat's channel formatting and delivery rules.
      Parameters:
      channel - the channel to send to
      sender - the player who sent the message
      message - the message component to send

    • removeMutedPlayer

      public static void removeMutedPlayer(MutedPlayer mutedPlayer)
      Removes a muted player entry from YoChat.
      Parameters:
      mutedPlayer - the muted player entry to remove

    • removeMutedPlayer

      public static void removeMutedPlayer(UUID uuid)
      Removes a muted player entry by UUID if it exists.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the UUID of the muted player

    • addMutedPlayer

      public static void addMutedPlayer(MutedPlayer mutedPlayer)
      Adds a muted player entry to YoChat.
      Parameters:
      mutedPlayer - the muted player entry to add

    • getMutedPlayer

      @Nullable public static @Nullable MutedPlayer getMutedPlayer(UUID uuid)
      Returns the muted player entry for the given UUID.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the UUID to look up
      Returns:
      the muted player entry, or null if the player is not muted

    • isMuted

      public static boolean isMuted(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Checks whether a player is currently muted.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to check
      Returns:
      true if the player is muted

    • isMuted

      public static boolean isMuted(UUID uuid)
      Checks whether a UUID is currently muted.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the UUID to check
      Returns:
      true if the UUID is muted

    • getMutedPlayers

      public static Collection<MutedPlayer> getMutedPlayers()
      Returns a snapshot of all muted player entries.
      Returns:
      a collection containing all muted players

    • getMutedPlayerNames

      public static List<String> getMutedPlayerNames()
      Returns the names of all muted players that Bukkit can resolve.
      Returns:
      a list of muted player names

    • formatMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component formatMessage(org.bukkit.entity.Player sender, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
      Formats a global chat message using YoChat's chat format.
      Parameters:
      sender - the player who sent the message
      message - the raw message component
      Returns:
      the formatted message component

    • formatChannelMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component formatChannelMessage(ChatChannel channel, org.bukkit.entity.Player sender, net.kyori.adventure.text.Component message)
      Formats a message using a specific channel's format.
      Parameters:
      channel - the channel whose format should be used
      sender - the player who sent the message
      message - the raw message component
      Returns:
      the formatted channel message component

    • parseMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component parseMessage(org.bukkit.entity.Player player, String input)
      Parses a player-provided message using YoChat's MiniMessage rules and permissions.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose permissions are used for parsing
      input - the raw input string
      Returns:
      the parsed component

    • parseAdminMessage

      public static net.kyori.adventure.text.Component parseAdminMessage(String input)
      Parses an administrative string using YoChat's full admin parser.
      Parameters:
      input - the raw input string
      Returns:
      the parsed component

    • registerStep

      public static void registerStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep nextStage)
      Registers a pipeline step using the step's own default priority.
      Parameters:
      stage - the pipeline stage to register into
      nextStage - the step implementation to register

    • registerStep

      public static void registerStep(Stage stage, ChatPipelineStep nextStage, int priority)
      Registers a pipeline step with an explicit priority.
      Parameters:
      stage - the pipeline stage to register into
      nextStage - the step implementation to register
      priority - the explicit priority for execution ordering

    • getRegisteredPipelineSteps

      public static List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep> getRegisteredPipelineSteps(Stage stage)
      Returns the registered pipeline steps for a specific stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to inspect
      Returns:
      an immutable snapshot of registered steps for that stage

    • getAllRegisteredPipelineSteps

      public static Collection<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep> getAllRegisteredPipelineSteps()
      Returns all registered pipeline steps across every stage.
      Returns:
      a snapshot containing every registered pipeline step

    • clearPipelineSteps

      public static void clearPipelineSteps(Stage stage)
      Removes all registered steps from a single stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to clear

    • clearAllPipelineSteps

      public static void clearAllPipelineSteps()
      Removes all registered pipeline steps from every stage.

    • unregisterStep

      public static void unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step)
      Unregisters a pipeline step from every stage where it is currently present.
      Parameters:
      step - the step instance to remove

    • unregisterStep

      public static void unregisterStep(ChatPipelineStep step, Stage stage)
      Unregisters a pipeline step from a specific stage.
      Parameters:
      step - the step instance to remove
      stage - the stage to remove it from

    • unregisterAllSteps

      public static void unregisterAllSteps()
      Alias for clearing all registered pipeline steps.

    • unregisterAllSteps

      public static void unregisterAllSteps(Stage stage)
      Alias for clearing all registered steps from a specific stage.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to clear

    • executePipeline

      public static void executePipeline(Stage stage, ChatContext context)
      Executes a single pipeline stage against the given context.
      Parameters:
      stage - the stage to execute
      context - the mutable chat context to process

    • executePipeline

      public static void executePipeline(ChatContext context)
      Executes the full YoChat pipeline against the given context.
      Parameters:
      context - the mutable chat context to process

    • getPipelineSteps

      public static Map<Stage,List<ChatPipelineStep>> getPipelineSteps()
      Returns a snapshot of pipeline steps grouped by stage.
      Returns:
      a stage-to-steps mapping snapshot

    • getPrefix

      public static String getPrefix(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the custom YoChat prefix for a player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to inspect
      Returns:
      the configured prefix, or an empty string when none is set

    • getPrefix

      public static String getPrefix(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer player)
      Returns the custom YoChat prefix for an offline player.
      Parameters:
      player - the offline player to inspect
      Returns:
      the configured prefix, or an empty string when none is set

    • setPrefix

      public static void setPrefix(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer player, String prefix)
      Sets or clears the custom YoChat prefix for an offline player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose prefix should be changed
      prefix - the new prefix, or null / blank to clear it

    • getSuffix

      public static String getSuffix(org.bukkit.entity.Player player)
      Returns the custom YoChat suffix for a player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to inspect
      Returns:
      the configured suffix, or an empty string when none is set

    • getSuffix

      public static String getSuffix(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer player)
      Returns the custom YoChat suffix for an offline player.
      Parameters:
      player - the offline player to inspect
      Returns:
      the configured suffix, or an empty string when none is set

    • setSuffix

      public static void setSuffix(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer player, String suffix)
      Sets or clears the custom YoChat suffix for an offline player.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose suffix should be changed
      suffix - the new suffix, or null / blank to clear it
